109: async function seedMenuIfEmpty() {
110:   try {
111:     const existing = await storage.getMenuItems();
112:     const activeCount = existing.filter(i => i.isActive).length;
113:     if (activeCount === 0) {
114:       log("[SEED] Menu trống — đang thêm dữ liệu mặc định...");
115:       for (const item of SEED_MENU_ITEMS) {
116:         await storage.createMenuItem({ name: item.name, price: item.price, isAvailable: true, isActive: true });
117:       }
118:       log(`[SEED] Đã thêm ${SEED_MENU_ITEMS.length} món ăn.`);
119:     }
120:   } catch (err) {
121:     console.error("[SEED] Lỗi seed menu:", err);
122:   }
123: }
